articles.title: Outrage trails EFCC’s sponsorship of judges’ foreign trip
articles.description:
The EFCC’s N54m sponsorship of judges for a UK trip sparks outrage, with critics citing a breakdown of ethics and potential judicial influence.

Read More: https://punchng.com/outrage-trails-efccs-sponsorship-of-judges-foreign-trip/
